_note: Transient. journalkeeper is NOT a GNode actor (it persists what crosses the broker, no grid role). This file exists only because gwbase 0.4.x's `ActorBase.__init__` requires GNode identity fields on disk — see F-004 in `wiki/gridworks-base/research/findings.md` (`ActorBase requires GNode identity even for non-GNode services`). Once F-004 lands (`ServiceSettings` split for non-GNode actors), this file SHALL be removed.
